message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EDEDED
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxPadding 10
}

box "Main process" #BFE3F2
participant Hook_StartActivity as HSA
participant VirtualCore as VC
participant VActivityManager as VAM
end box

box "Server process" #8EF08E
participant VActivityManagerService as VAMS
participant VPackageManagerService as VPMS
participant ProviderCaller as PC
end box

box "App Client process" #6F6F6F
participant StubContentProvider as SCP
end box

participant VRedirectActRequest as VRAR
participant VActRedirectResult as VARR

HSA -> VC : resolveActivityInfo
activate VC
deactivate VC

HSA -> VRAR : new VRedirectActRequest
activate VRAR
VRAR --> HSA : req
deactivate VRAR

HSA -> VAM : redirectTargetActivity
activate VAM
VAM -> VAMS : redirectTargetActivity
activate VAMS

VAMS -> VAMS : redirectTargetActivityLocked
VAMS -> VAMS : startProcessLocked
VAMS -> VAMS : queryFreeStubForProcess
VAMS -> VAMS : performStartProcessLocked

VAMS -> VPMS : querySharedPackages
activate VPMS
VPMS --> VAMS : sharedPackages : List<String>
deactivate VPMS

VAMS -> VPMS : queryContentProviders
activate VPMS
VPMS --> VAMS : providers : List<ProviderInfo>
deactivate VPMS

VAMS -> VPMS : getSharedLibraries
activate VPMS
VPMS --> VAMS : usesLibraries : List<String>
deactivate VPMS

VAMS -> PC : call(MethodConstants.INIT_PROCESS)
activate PC
PC -> SCP : call
activate SCP
SCP -> SCP : initProcess
deactivate SCP
deactivate PC

note over VAMS, SCP
StubContentProvider.java中定义了20个静态内部类C1到C20，都是StubContentProvider的子类，并且在AndroidManifest.xml的stub中声明了process字段，与对应的StubActivity一致。
VA的服务进程取出一个空的stubContentProvider，借助Android ContentProvider机制，系统会创建一个新进程出来，然后被作为双开应用的容身之所。这个偷梁换柱的过程由VA服务进程完成。
end note

VAMS -> VAMS : fetchStubActivityInfo
VAMS --> VAM : result = new VActRedirectResult
deactivate VAMS
VAM --> HSA : result = new VActRedirectResult
deactivate VAM

@enduml
